title: Better End Portal Shader
description: A Shader that changed the End Portal effect to look more clean
body:
**A very light shader pack for Iris that only changes the End Portal effect, to make it slightly better looking.**
The rest of the shader is exactly the same as vanilla

Showcase Video: [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GNHyX-OU-tc](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=GNHyX-OU-tc)

![Better End Portal Shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1c6d679e07a33bbb50b1377f0ed83478b0a6b30_0.webp)

![Comparison between vanilla and shader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3db3c9b81586d73dcfc28d379f87ec0cbded3929.png)

**This shader pack was made by MrBrose, with help from RJ_Infinity**

You have permission to use this code in your own shader, however please link to this page somewhere in your project.

Base code based off of "Base-Shader" by Bestsoft100
https://modrinth.com/shader/base-shader
